title: Find $$r$$
text: In an expression of the form c * $$b^k$$, the base $$b$$ is the common ratio. Here $$r$$ $$=$$ $$\frac{4}{3}$$.

title: Check |r|
text: Since $$r$$ $$=$$ $$\frac{4}{3}$$, we have |r| $$=$$ $$\frac{4}{3}$$ > $$1$$. When |r| $$ \geq $$ $$1$$, the terms grow and the series diverges.

title: Conclusion
text: Because |r| > $$1$$, the infinite geometric series diverges and its sum is not defined.
